commands.command: uv run --no-project --with pytest --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest tests/test_document_spec.py tests/test_delegate_document_spec.py tests/test_server.py tests/test_capabilities.py tests/test_live_current_document.py -q
uv run --no-project --with pytest --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with pyflakes --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest -q
uv run --no-project --with pyflakes env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pyflakes hangeul_core hangeul_mcp tests
uv run --no-project --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 - <<'PY' ... await server.mcp.list_tools() ... PY
uv run --no-project --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m hangeul_mcp.manage --help

notes: DocumentSpec v1 now covers all four school templates and all three official templates in planner and delegate generation tests.

The shipped contract is conservative: school templates are section-authoritative, official templates remain metadata-driven, template-owned assets/images plus alignment hints are rejected, and malformed nested payloads fail closed before delegate execution.
Windows/Hangul live evidence is not feasible in this Linux session and was not simulated. Existing desktop-live pending work remains tracked separately in PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA.md.
